title: oopsallminecraft
description: This modpack is a collection of mods that enhance the vanilla feel of Minecraft. It also serves as a personal passion project in teaching me how develop a Minecraft modpack.
body:
###  **This is an active project. Many changes will be implemented between updates to best suit the desired outcome. Please be patient as I work through bugs and implement fixes if necessary.**

# Oops All Minecraft

A carefully crafted modpack that expands every part of the game without losing what makes Minecraft feel like Minecraft.

Explore breathtaking new landscapes, uncover hidden structures, face enhanced combat, build powerful Create-powered machines, and gear up with fantasy-inspired weapons and armor—all while enjoying smooth performance, immersive visuals, and seamless multiplayer.

More adventure. More depth. More Minecraft.

### World Generation

A complete overhaul of Minecraft’s world designed to feel expansive, natural, and immersive.

- Dozens of new biomes with Terralith
- Revamped Nether and End with new environments and atmosphere
- Seasonal changes that bring the world to life
- Improved caves, terrain flow, and exploration variety

Every direction you travel offers something new to discover.

### Terrain & Biomes

Terrain generation has been enhanced to feel more realistic and dramatic.

- Larger, more detailed mountains and valleys
- Smooth biome transitions
### Structures & Exploration

Adventure is everywhere, with a massive expansion of structures and points of interest.

- Overhauled vanilla structures (strongholds, temples, dungeons, and more)
- New villages, towers, and settlements
- Additional dungeons and exploration challenges
- Better structure spacing for meaningful discovery
### Archaeology & Discovery

Uncover hidden secrets scattered throughout the world.

- Explore ruins, structures, and hidden locations
- Discover rare loot and unique finds
### Mobs & Wildlife

The world is more alive—and more dangerous.

- New animals and creatures across multiple biomes
- Improved mob variety and behaviors
- A richer, more dynamic ecosystem
- Environments that feel populated and reactive
### Combat Overhaul

Combat has been reworked to feel smoother, more dynamic, and more engaging.

- Fluid, animation-based combat system
- Weapon-specific attack styles and movement
- More immersive and responsive fighting
- Better synergy with new weapons and enemies
- New weapons and armor sets
- Expanded enchantments and item variety
### Create Tech & Automation

Build, automate, and innovate using the Create mod and its addons.

- Steam 'n' Rails
- Design 'n' Decor
- Deco
- And much more
### Animations & Visuals

Minecraft feels more modern, fluid, and alive while staying true to its style.

- Improved mob animations and behaviors
- Updated textures and visual enhancements
- Better lighting and rendering support
- Optional shader compatibility
### Voice Chat & Immersion

Designed with multiplayer and immersion in mind.

- Built-in proximity voice chat
- Enhanced sound and environmental audio
### Quality of Life & Performance

A large collection of improvements to make gameplay smoother, faster, and more enjoyable.

- Better UI, tooltips, and inventory management
- Significant performance boosts and optimization
- Minimap and navigation tools

[Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)

[Backpacked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/backpacked)

[Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework)

_If you have problems or suggestions message gohing on discord._
